source_timezone.description: Source IANA timezone name (e.g., 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London'). Use '<local_tz>' as local timezone if no source timezone provided by the user.

target_timezone.description: Target IANA timezone name (e.g., 'Asia/Tokyo', 'America/San_Francisco'). Use '<local_tz>' as local timezone if no target timezone provided by the user.

arguments.name: source_timezone
arguments.description: Source IANA timezone name (e.g., 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London'). Use '<local_tz>' as local timezone if no source timezone provided by the user.

arguments.name: target_timezone
arguments.description: Target IANA timezone name (e.g., 'Asia/Tokyo', 'America/San_Francisco'). Use '<local_tz>' as local timezone if no target timezone provided by the user.
